ordered_steps.detail: Was May 25 guard_pause text → June 2 distribution_architecture_repair with current blocker inventory
Commit 63921a412 — links to init/diagnose/dry-run terminal captures. Pushed Codeberg + GitHub mirror.

distribution_lane_executor.py _write_marketing_execution_board: decoupled board-hash check from mutable lane-hash check. _match → _board_match. Root cause: lane JSON mutates every run, so aggregated hash ALWAYS mismatched.
stale_artifact_watchdog_receipt.json refreshed with current board + lane hashes. Dry-run verified: next run.py would skip board overwrite.

seven_deployed_as.bug: 7th-recurrence stale-board overwrite — lane hash coupled with board hash

summary: Demo terminal captures surfaced on primary conversion surface (README) + 7th-recurrence stale-board vulnerability fixed. 4 architecture repairs executed in one run.
blocking_factors: PyPI token missing for new releases
notes: Prior session's README change was staged but uncommitted — this run completed the delivery chain (commit + push + verify). The 7th-recurrence fix closes a design defect (decoupled mutable/immutable artifact hashes) that guaranteed stale-board overwrite on every run.py execution.
